text:
-- Installing: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/SpaceCadetPinball/work/stage/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/192x192/apps/SpaceCadetPinball.png
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===========================================================================
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: share/applications/SpaceCadetPinball.desktop
Error: Orphaned: share/icons/hicolor/128x128/apps/SpaceCadetPinball.png
Error: Orphaned: share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/SpaceCadetPinball.png
Error: Orphaned: share/icons/hicolor/192x192/apps/SpaceCadetPinball.png
Error: Orphaned: share/icons/hicolor/32x32/apps/SpaceCadetPinball.png
Error: Orphaned: share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/SpaceCadetPinball.png
Error: Orphaned: share/metainfo/SpaceCadetPinball.metainfo.xml
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR


This is in a poudriere building games/SpaceCadetPinball, with the -t (testport) flag. The -devel port has a full pkg-plist file that does list these.
